name: 客栈厢房
description: 简朴客房空间，中央塌床与矮桌，墙面挂简单字画，地面木板，窗边有药碗与衣物，床头散落风筝残片，整体干净但略显局促。
visual_reference: Modest Ming dynasty inn guest room interior daytime, central low bed and small table, simple wall paintings, wooden plank floor, window-side medicine bowl and scattered clothing, kite fragments on bedside, clean yet cramped historical traveler lodging
lighting: 日光从纸窗透入，柔和均匀
